instruction.summary: 34 bus to Woking, Woking Railway Station
South Western Railway to Clapham Junction
instruction.detailed: South Western Railway towards London Waterloo

disruptions.description: CLAPHAM JUNCTION: From Tuesday 24 March 2026 until November 2027, the footbridge at Clapham Junction will be modernised, section by section. The bridge will remain open, but space will be reduced. If you are travelling to or changing trains at Clapham Junction, please allow extra time for your journey.
